window_summary: This window tracks the recent PostgREST/postgrest release stream from v12.2.5 through v14.12, covering bug fixes, new features, and breaking changes across multiple minor and major versions.

chunks.title: v13.0.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: PostgREST/postgrest
Release: v13.0.0
Tag: v13.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-05-08T20:45:29Z; created_at: 2025-05-08T19:48:49Z
Release notes:
## Features
### API
- [Spread to-many relationships](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/api/resource_embedding.html#spread-to-many-relationships)  by @laurenceisla in #3640
+ Using aggregates in spread to-many is not yet supported ([ref](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/api/aggregate_functions.html#aggregates-in-to-one-spreads)).
- [Automatic tsvector convertion](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/api/tables_views.html#automatic-tsvector-conversion) on filters by @laurenceisla in #2255
- Improved performance when using RPCs via GET by @wolfgangwalther in #2858
+ The generated queries are tuned so indexes can be used in more cases.
- Allow using `not_null` as value for the `is` [operator](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/api/tables_views.html#operators) by @taimoorzaeem in #3747
### Authentication
- Searching on an array for [JWT Role Extraction](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/auth.html#jwt-role-extraction) by @taimoorzaeem in #1536.
### Observability
- [Proxy-Status header](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/errors.html#proxy-status-header) for error responses by @taimoorzaeem in #2967
- [Content-Length header](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/observability.html#content-length-header) for traces on egress traffic by @laurenceisla in #4016
- [SQL query logs](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/observability.html#sql-query-logs) by @laurenceisla in #1578
- Log resolved host in startup "Listening on ..." messages by @develop7 in #3560
- Log maximum pool size by @steve-chavez in #3727
- Log connection pool borrows on `log-level=debug` by @taimoorzaeem in #3903
### Errors
- Improved JWT errors by @taimoorzaeem in #3600, #3926
+ `PGRST301` is now returned when `Bearer` in the Authorization header is sent empty
+ `PGRST303` is now returned when decoding JWT claims fails
+ Better diagnostic error messages instead of exposed internals messages
- Return `PGRST125` instead of an empty json, when an invalid URL path is requested by @taimoorzaeem in #3906
- Return `PGRST126` instead of an empty json, when OpenAPI is requested and it's disabled by @taimoorzaeem  in #3906
### Admin Server
- [admin-server-host](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v13/references/configuration.html#admin-server-host) config to set the host for the admin server by @develop7 in #3558
## Fixes
- Prevent spread embedding to allow aggregates when they are disabled by @laurenceisla in #3693
- A nested spread embedding now correctly groups by the fields of its top parent relationship by @laurenceisla in #3693
- Fix spread embedding errors when using the `count()` aggregate without a field by @laurenceisla in #3693
+ Fixed `"column reference <col> is ambiguous"` error when selecting `?select=...table(col,count())`
+ Fixed `"column <json_aggregate>.<alias> does not exist"` error when selecting `?select=...table(aias:count())`
- Clarify listener logs by @steve-chavez in #3727
- Clarify `Accept: vnd.pgrst.object` error message by @steve-chavez in #3795
- Handle queries on non-existing table gracefully by @taimoorzaeem in #3697, #3602
- Fix using `order=` in mutation requests by @taimoorzaeem in #3013
- Fix filtering on unselected columns in a table-valued function by @taimoorzaeem in #3965
- Fix schema cache loading duplicate objects with different object type but same oid by @taimoorzaeem in #4052
- Querying non-existent table now returns `PGRST205` error instead of an empty json by @taimoorzaeem in #3697, #3602
- Fail to start when `server-port` and `admin-server-port` config options are the same by @develop7 in #3508
- Fail to start when the JWT secret is less than 32 characters long by @laurenceisla in #3607
## Breaking Changes
- Drop support for Postgres EOL versions: 9.6, 10 and 11 by @wolfgangwalther in...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release v13.0.0, the project introduces features including spread to-many relationships, automatic tsvector conversion on filters, improved performance for RPCs via GET, the 'not_null' operator value, JWT role extraction from arrays, a Proxy-Status header for error responses, Content-Length header for traces, SQL query logs, improved JWT errors, new error codes PGRST125 and PGRST126, and an admin-server-host config. Fixes include preventing spread embedding from allowing aggregates when disabled, handling queries on non-existing tables gracefully, fixing order in mutation requests, and failing to start when server-port and admin-server-port are the same. Breaking changes drop support for PostgreSQL EOL versions 9.6, 10, and 11.

chunks.title: v13.0.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: PostgREST/postgrest
Release: v13.0.1
Tag: v13.0.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-01T14:08:35Z; created_at: 2025-06-01T13:10:43Z
Release notes:
### Fixed
- Fix jwt error returning HTTP status `400` for invalid role by @taimoorzaeem in #3601
- Fix `db-extra-search-path` cannot be set to nothing by @taimoorzaeem in #4074
+ It can now be disabled by setting it to empty string.
+ Schema Cache load error is now logged including `db-schemas` and `db-extra-search-path` config values.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release v13.0.1, the project fixes a JWT error returning HTTP status 400 for invalid role and fixes 'db-extra-search-path' so it can be disabled by setting it to an empty string, with schema cache load errors now logged including config values.

chunks.title: v13.0.7
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: PostgREST/postgrest
Release: v13.0.7
Tag: v13.0.7; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-09-14T20:03:29Z; created_at: 2025-09-14T19:08:53Z
Release notes:
### Added
- Improve the `PGRST106` error when the requested schema is invalid by @laurenceisla in #4089
+ It now shows the invalid schema in the `message` field.
+ The exposed schemas are now listed in the `hint` instead of the `message` field.
- Improve error details of `PGRST301` error by @taimoorzaeem in #4051
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release v13.0.7, the project improves the PGRST106 error when the requested schema is invalid by showing the invalid schema in the message field and listing exposed schemas in the hint, and improves error details of the PGRST301 error.

chunks.title: v14.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: PostgREST/postgrest
Release: v14.0
Tag: v14.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-10-25T00:46:12Z; created_at: 2025-10-24T22:39:04Z
Release notes:
## Features
### Authentication
- Bounded [JWT cache using the SIEVE algorithm](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v14/references/auth.html#jwt-cache) by @mkleczek in #4084
+ Increases throughput of all requests having a JWT. 20% more throughput for GET requests according to our benchmarks.
+ Includes [JWT Cache Metrics](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v14/references/observability.html#jwt-cache-metrics).
### CLI
- [Ready flag](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v14/references/cli.html#ready-flag) for postgrest healthcheck by @taimoorzaeem in #4239
## Fixes
- Fix schema cache loading taking a long time for large schemas by @mkleczek in #4360, #3704
+ On a complex database, [it goes down from 7 minutes to 2 seconds](https://github.com/PostgREST/postgrest/pull/4396#issuecomment-3393243374).
- Fix not logging OpenAPI queries when `log-query` is enabled by @steve-chavez in #4226
- Fix not logging explain query when `log-query` is enabled by @steve-chavez in #4319
- Fix not logging transaction variables and db-pre-request function when `log-query` is enabled by @steve-chavez in #3934
- Fix not logging the JSON message to stderr on a `PGRST002` error by @laurenceisla in #4129
- Fix reloading the Schema Cache unnecessarily on a `PGRST002` error by @laurenceisla in #4367
## Breaking Changes
- Drop support for PostgreSQL EOL version 12 by @wolfgangwalther in #3865
- From now on PostgREST will follow a `MAJOR.PATCH` two-part versioning. Only even-numbered MAJOR versions will be released, reserving odd-numbered MAJOR versions for development.
- Replaced `jwt-cache-max-lifetime` config with [jwt-cache-max-entries](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v14/references/configuration.html#jwt-cache-max-entries) by @mkleczek in #4084
- [log-query](https://docs.postgrest.org/en/v14/references/configuration.html#log-query) config now takes a boolean instead of a string value by @steve-chavez in #3934
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release v14.0, the project introduces a bounded JWT cache using the SIEVE algorithm, increasing throughput for GET requests by 20% and including JWT cache metrics, and a ready flag for healthcheck. Fixes include speeding up schema cache loading for large schemas from 7 minutes to 2 seconds, logging OpenAPI queries and explain queries when log-query is enabled, and fixing reloading the schema cache unnecessarily on PGRST002 errors. Breaking changes drop support for PostgreSQL EOL version 12, adopt MAJOR.PATCH two-part versioning, replace jwt-cache-max-lifetime with jwt-cache-max-entries, and change log-query config to a boolean.

chunks.title: v14.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: PostgREST/postgrest
Release: v14.1
Tag: v14.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-05T15:09:40Z; created_at: 2025-11-05T14:09:22Z
Release notes:
## Fixed
- Fix `db-pre-config` function failing when function names are pg reserved words by @taimoorzaeem in #4380
- Fix `server-host=!6` incorrectly binds to IPv4 address by @taimoorzaeem in #3202
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release v14.1, the project fixes the 'db-pre-config' function failing when function names are pg reserved words and fixes 'server-host=!6' incorrectly binding to an IPv4 address.

chunks.title: v14.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: PostgREST/postgrest
Release: v14.2
Tag: v14.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-12-19T03:11:41Z; created_at: 2025-12-19T02:30:38Z
Release notes:
### Fixed
- Fix `hasSingleUnnamedParam` incorrectly matching functions with named parameters by @joelonsql in #4553
+ Functions with a single named parameter (e.g., `foo(data json)`) no longer incorrectly match the single-param fallback, returning a clean `PGRST202` error instead of a confusing PostgreSQL `42883` error.
- Fix misleading logs on unsupported PostgreSQL versions by @taimoorzaeem in #4519
- Fix regression where the `PGRST103` error response was truncated by @laurenceisla in #4455
+ Happened when an `offset` was greater than the rows requested and `Prefer: count=exact` was sent.
- Fix not returning `Content-Length` on empty HTTP `201` responses by @laurenceisla in #4518
- Fix inaccurate Server-Timing header durations by @steve-chavez in #4522
- Fix inaccurate "Schema cache queried" logs by @steve-chavez in #4522
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release v14.2, the project fixes 'hasSingleUnnamedParam' incorrectly matching functions with named parameters, misleading logs on unsupported PostgreSQL versions, a regression where the PGRST103 error response was truncated, not returning Content-Length on empty HTTP 201 responses, inaccurate Server-Timing header durations, and inaccurate 'Schema cache queried' logs.

chunks.title: v14.11
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: PostgREST/postgrest
Release: v14.11
Tag: v14.11; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-04T19:21:07Z; created_at: 2026-05-04T17:59:24Z
Release notes:
### Fixed
- Fix login with uppercase and mixed case role names by @taimoorzaeem in #4678
- Restore Listener query shape so it can be found in `pg_stat_activity` by @mkleczek in #4857 #4859
- The LISTEN channel now automatically recovers when it stops working due to a PostgreSQL bug @laurenceisla in #3147
- Fix misleading "Functions" name on schema cache summary in startup logs by @taimoorzaeem in #4821
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release v14.11, the project fixes login with uppercase and mixed case role names, restores the listener query shape so it can be found in pg_stat_activity, makes the LISTEN channel automatically recover when it stops working due to a PostgreSQL bug, and fixes a misleading 'Functions' name on schema cache summary in startup logs.

chunks.title: v14.12
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: PostgREST/postgrest
Release: v14.12
Tag: v14.12; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-20T19:05:32Z; created_at: 2026-05-20T17:20:38Z
Release notes:
### Fixed
- Fix race condition in pool_available metric causing negative values during network instability by @mkleczek in #4622
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release v14.12, the project fixes a race condition in the pool_available metric causing negative values during network instability.

questions.query_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest releases, which release fixes a regression that makes ORDER BY with nulls-order not work alongside limits?

answer_support.answer_text: fixes a regression that makes ORDER BY with nulls-order not work alongside limits

questions.query_text: Across the PostgREST/postgrest releases, how does the JWT cache change described in v12.2.10 differ from the JWT cache change described in v14.0?

options.text: v12.2.10 fixes a performance issue where JWT cache purging on every request decreased performance, while v14.0 introduces a bounded JWT cache using the SIEVE algorithm that increases throughput and includes cache metrics.
v12.2.10 removes the JWT cache entirely, while v14.0 adds a new JWT cache with no performance impact.
Both releases only fix JWT cache expiration handling without any performance improvements.
v12.2.10 introduces the SIEVE algorithm, while v14.0 fixes a purging performance issue.

questions.expected_answer: v12.2.10 fixes a performance issue where JWT cache purging on every request decreased performance, while v14.0 introduces a bounded JWT cache using the SIEVE algorithm that increases throughput and includes cache metrics.

answer_support.answer_text: fixes a performance issue where JWT cache purging on every request decreased performance
introduces a bounded JWT cache using the SIEVE algorithm, increasing throughput for GET requests by 20% and including JWT cache metrics

questions.query_text: In the PostgREST/postgrest release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that fixes startup for the arm64 Docker image, (2) a release that introduces spread to-many relationships and automatic tsvector conversion, (3) a release that introduces a bounded JWT cache using the SIEVE algorithm and a ready flag for healthcheck, (4) a release that fixes a race condition in the pool_available metric causing negative values during network instability.

answer_support.answer_text: fixes startup for the arm64 Docker image
introduces spread to-many relationships and automatic tsvector conversion
introduces a bounded JWT cache using the SIEVE algorithm and a ready flag for healthcheck
fixes a race condition in the pool_available metric causing negative values during network instability
